name: applicant_name_present
expression: applicant_name IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(applicant_name)) > 0
description: applicant_name is required for Insurance Policy Application extraction.

name: policy_type_requested_present
expression: policy_type_requested IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(policy_type_requested)) > 0
description: policy_type_requested is required for Insurance Policy Application extraction.

name: effective_date_requested_present
expression: effective_date_requested IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(effective_date_requested)) > 0
description: effective_date_requested is required for Insurance Policy Application extraction.

name: coverage_limit_requested_non_negative
description: coverage_limit_requested should be non-negative when present.

name: deductible_requested_non_negative
description: deductible_requested should be non-negative when present.

name: annual_revenue_non_negative
description: annual_revenue should be non-negative when present.
